title: Tiger Woods in a Car Crash
summary: Tiger Woods, a famous golfer, was in a car crash in Florida. He rolled his car after trying to pass a truck too fast. No one got hurt, but he was arrested because police thought he might be impaired by something, not alcohol. He took a breath test and passed it, but he refused another test. He stayed in jail for eight hours and then was released on bail. This means he can go home but must follow rules until his court date. The crash caused damage to property, and he faces charges for driving under the influence and refusing the test.

background_read: Tiger Woods is a famous golfer who has won many tournaments. In Florida, he had a car crash where his car rolled over. Police arrested him because they thought he might be impaired, but not by alcohol. He passed a breath test but refused another test. He was released on bail, which means he paid money to leave jail and must go to court later. This story shows how even famous people must follow driving laws.
Article_Structure: WHO: Tiger Woods, a famous golfer
WHAT: He was in a car crash and arrested for driving under the influence
WHERE: In Florida, on Beach Road
WHY: Because police thought he was impaired, possibly by an unknown substance, after he tried to overtake a truck too fast

perspectives.description: Tiger Woods faces charges for driving under the influence and property damage, which are serious laws to keep roads safe.
